headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://newsletter.bitsocial.net; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; form-action 'self' https://newsletter.bitsocial.net; frame-ancestors 'none'; img-src 'self' data: https:; object-src 'none'; script-src 'self' 'sha256-NhPbeWZiMmSqcYasrsctmwiryDCgGXUab5aAjHUzN+M='; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; upgrade-insecure-requests
headers.Permissions-Policy: accelerometer=(), camera=(), geolocation=(), gyroscope=(), magnetometer=(), microphone=(), payment=(), usb=()
